_comment: Single source of truth for SouthQuest Farm facts. Static site with no build pipeline — these values are NOT auto-injected, they must be kept in sync by hand across all HTML files. Run a sitewide grep for the old values below before/after any edit that touches these facts.
arrival_rate_claim: REMOVE — unverified, delete this claim sitewide, do not restate in any form
moq_source_note: Already live on site pre-EXECUTION and reused consistently across P0-P6 work without user correction; treated as confirmed per user's 2026-07-08 instruction to use the values in the diagnostic doc as real.
phyto_fee_display: $50 USD certificate fee on orders under $800 USD; free on orders over $800 USD
email_note: User confirmed 2026-07-11 info@succulentsfarm.com is live (Cloudflare Email Routing). Replaced donghuanno1@gmail.com sitewide.
transit_days_uae_note: User confirmed 2026-07-11: all UAE shipments go by air freight; the air-transit leg itself is ~2 days, not counting the 2-4 day pre-shipment drying period or customs clearance. Replaces the old unconfirmed 4-6 / 5-7 business day per-emirate split.
social_note: User-provided 2026-07-11, wired into footer .footer-social links sitewide and Organization/LocalBusiness sameAs.
legal_entity_en: Yunnan Nanjing Xunzong Trading Co., Ltd.
legal_entity_cn: 云南南境寻踪商贸有限公司
farm_address_cn: 云南省昆明市呈贡区吴家营街道 欧尼园艺
farm_address_en: Ouni Horticulture, Wujiaying Subdistrict, Chenggong District, Kunming, Yunnan Province, China
farm_address_note: User-provided 2026-07-10, translated by Claude (欧尼园艺 -> "Ouni Horticulture" is a working translation, not a confirmed official English business name -- flag to user if an official spelling exists). Google Maps embed uses the Chinese string as the query for accurate geocoding.
google_maps_embed_query: 云南省昆明市呈贡区吴家营街道欧尼园艺
banned_patterns: triple parallel X, Y, and Z rhetoric
more than a X, we are Y
keep_and_amplify_lines: no automated replies, no sales scripts
We photograph your actual plants before dispatch
